title: Curation of Domain Datasets
concept: Domain tuning requires high-quality corpora (medical logs, legal contracts) paired with clean formatting templates to teach target terminology.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following is an example of a domain-specific dataset?

options.text: A list of funny cat videos
A collection of medical journals and patient logs
Random chats from a public gaming forum

exercises.explain: Domain datasets are highly specialized files (like medical records) used to train AI on specific subjects.

cards.title: Garbage In, Garbage Out
cards.body: Would you trust a robot doctor that learned medicine from random social media posts? Probably not! To make AI helpful in fields like law or medicine, we must feed it carefully chosen, ultra-clean datasets.

cards.title: What is Domain Curation?
cards.body: Curation of domain datasets is the process of collecting, filtering, and organizing specialized information (like legal papers or medical reports) and putting them into clean formats so an AI can learn a specific industry's language.

cards.title: The Pastry Chef's Recipe Book
cards.body: Imagine feeding a chef a cookbook full of random household recipes versus a specialized pastry book. If you want them to bake world-class croissants, you hide the soup recipes and give them only the finest, clean baking guides. Similarly, to make an AI a medical expert, you feed it structured, pure medical texts, not random internet forums.

cards.title: Structuring a Legal Dataset
cards.body: A legal AI needs to understand contracts. Instead of raw text files, engineers gather thousands of real lease agreements, remove personal client info, and format them using a template like: 'Document Type: [Lease Agreement] | Key Term: [Security Deposit]'. This helps the AI learn legal patterns.

cards.title: Is More Data Always Better?
cards.body: Many believe that to make a smart AI, you just need to feed it *more* data. In specialized fields, quality beats quantity. A small, perfectly organized set of medical journals teaches an AI much better than a massive pile of unorganized internet chat rooms.

cards.title: Messy vs. Structured Data
cards.body: Let's compare how we organize data for a medical AI. Unorganized data is chaotic, while curated data uses structure.

right.text: Structured log: '[Symptom: Joint Pain] | [Possible Diagnosis: Patellar Sprain] | [Severity: Moderate]'

left.text: A messy forum post saying: 'My knee hurts bad, maybe it's a sprain or something, IDK.'

exercises.prompt: What is the key ingredient needed to train an AI on a specific domain like medicine or law?

options.text: High-quality, specialized texts formatted with clean templates
A massive collection of random internet memes and jokes
Audio recordings of traffic noise from big cities
A list of random numbers generated by a computer

exercises.explain: Domain tuning requires high-quality, specialized text (corpora) formatted cleanly so the AI can learn specific terminology.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Using clean templates to format specialized text is important when preparing a domain dataset.
exercises.explain: Clean templates are essential to help the model learn the structure and terminology of a specific field.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word to complete the description of domain dataset preparation.
exercises.sentence: To teach an AI specialized jargon, we pair high-quality texts with clean formatting templates.
exercises.explain: Templates help structure raw specialized text so the AI can easily learn the relationships between domain-specific terms.

exercises.prompt: Which of these samples represents a curated, template-formatted domain dataset entry for a Legal AI?

options.text: Hey, here is that contract. Just look for the money part somewhere in the middle. Thanks!
Document: [Commercial Lease] | Section: [Liability] | Clause: [The tenant agrees to hold the landlord harmless from any damage...]
I think I need a lawyer because my landlord is not fixing the sink. What should I write in an email?

exercises.explain: The AI-generated dataset is structured using clean templates and specific professional terminology, whereas the human-style draft is messy, conversational, and lacks structure.

exercises.prompt: You are building a specialized medical AI assistant. What is the best strategy to teach it professional medical terminology?

options.text: Download billions of random web pages and feed them to the model directly.
Manually write millions of responses by hand without using any real-world documents.
Gather high-quality medical records and apply clean templates to teach the terminology.
Translate the entire English internet into another language to confuse the AI.

exercises.explain: Domain tuning requires a curated corpus of domain-specific data formatted cleanly with templates, rather than just downloading raw, unfiltered internet pages.
